page.title: Fermentation
page.subtitle: Wet-mill fermentation — live curves, cut-point alerts, eco-mill water tracking

dossier.title: Lot {lotCode}
dossier.subtitle: Per-lot quality cockpit — pH/temp/Brix curves, cut point, and water per kg

board.emptyDescription: Start a ferment on a milled-in lot to open the make-quality loop — live pH/temp/Brix curves and a cut-point alert before the window closes.

cutpoint.noRecipe: No recipe applied — apply a recipe to project the cut point.
cutpoint.noReadings: No readings — log a pH reading to track the cut.
cutpoint.cutNowTitle: Cut now — pH {latest} hit the target of {target}.
cutpoint.trackingSub: {hours} · the cut alert fires when pH reaches the target band.

curve.emptySub: Log a reading to start the live curve.
curve.ariaSummary: {label} ferment curve, {count} readings over {hours} hours, from {min} to {max}.

tracker.phDescription: Live acidity vs the recipe target band — the curve the cut is made on
tracker.logReadingDescription: Manual tap now — a BLE pH/temp probe drops in later behind the same door
tracker.millWaterDescription: Log every draw of mill water — feeds the per-kilo consumption
